_note: Sidecar for the embarkation-day article. Service/process content, no affiliate links. Process is described in hedged, general terms ('usually', 'most major lines', 'typically') because exact times and procedures vary by line and ship; the lived anchor is the author's own embarkations, recorded in the Quantum logbook (articles/quantum-of-the-seas-pacific-coastal.html). No ship stats or hard numbers asserted from training data.

affiliate_posture.rationale: Process explainer, not a product page. No affiliate links. Cross-links go to free tools and to the gear/packing/seasickness articles.

check_in_window_app.claim: Online check-in assigns a ~30-minute arrival window booked in the cruise line's app; early slots fill first
check_in_window_app.basis: Current standard practice across major cruise lines; framed with 'usually' hedge. Consistent with the author's lived embarkations (Quantum logbook).

board_before_cabin_ready.claim: Guests board before cabins open; staterooms typically ready early afternoon
board_before_cabin_ready.basis: Standard practice; lived anchor — Quantum logbook Day 1 ('boarded around 1:00 p.m.', staterooms opened later)

emuster_app.claim: Muster drill is now largely app-based (watch video + check in at station) on most major lines
emuster_app.basis: Post-2020 eMuster standard across major lines; framed 'most major lines'. Lived anchor — Quantum logbook ('the muster drill was a video on the app').

luggage_by_dinner.claim: Checked bags delivered to cabin through the afternoon/evening, often by dinner, sometimes later
luggage_by_dinner.basis: Standard practice; framed with hedge. Reason given for packing a carry-on.

porters_curb.claim: Porters take checked bags at the curb; small tip customary
porters_curb.basis: Standard practice. Lived anchor — Quantum logbook embarkation.

lived_anchor.claim: Author has embarked multiple times, including one that began in a full terminal power outage
lived_anchor.source: articles/quantum-of-the-seas-pacific-coastal.html (Day 1 — blackout embarkation, boarded ~1pm; Day 7 — in-transit turnaround). Attested first-hand content already published on the site; linked, not re-fabricated.

voice_audit.authorship_mode: Service/process content with a lived-grade anchor (the blackout embarkation, linked). Calm, anxiety-reducing tone for first-timers; accessibility and kids/anxiety addressed.

must_be_present.honest_limitation_acknowledged: Process framed as 'usually/typically/most lines' rather than absolutes; explicitly notes times vary by line/ship.
must_be_present.lived_anchor: Yes — the power-outage embarkation, linked to the logbook.
must_be_present.pastoral_honesty: Names the first-day anxiety directly; closes calm, not chipper.

voice_audit.risk_rating_justification: No fabricated stats; process hedged; lived anchor present; no affiliate conflict. Re-confirm against shipped HTML before commit.
